title: FatCat Jujutsu Kaisen
description: Yep another JJK modpack for ya all
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b1864f408858e55b54b7e547b386b33c8ab59a9.png)
## Overview
Dive into a thrilling RPG adventure inspired by the world of **Jujutsu Kaisen**! This modpack transforms Minecraft into a cursed-infested domain where you step into the shoes of a sorcerer. Learn and master powerful cursed techniques, battle terrifying cursed spirits, and explore a dynamic world filled with iconic locations like Tokyo Metropolitan Magic Technical College and Shibuya.
## Features
- 🌀 Cursed Techniques & Powers to dominate battles
- ⚔️ Epic Fight Mod for cinematic combat
- 👹 Battle cursed spirits and special grade bosses
- 🏛️ Explore iconic locations from Jujutsu Kaisen
- 🧵 Use cursed tools, weapons, talismans, and outfits
- 🤝 Multiplayer-ready for co-op or PvP battles
- 🌟 Shader support for enhanced visuals
##
